name: Ruggalach I
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift flour and blend with softened butter.
2. Add sour cream and egg yolk. Divide into 4 equal balls and chill at least 3 hours or overnight in the refrigerator.
3. For filling, mix chopped walnuts, sugar, and cinnamon (you can also add raisins to the filling mix).
4. Roll dough into 4 circles and cut into 12 wedges each.
5. Roll with 1/2 tsp of filling at the outer edge of each wedge (wide end).
6. Brush with egg white and dip in sugar mixture to coat the top.
7. Bake at 400 degrees for about 20 minutes on a lightly greased sheet. Makes 4 dozen.
